title: Fluid Sieve
description: A block that extracts resources from fluids (or any other block) above it.
body:
This mod adds a block that generates items depending on the block above.
It also adds two net blocks that can provide certain resources.

The mod is designed to be tweaked by a datapack to fit into skyblock style modpacks.
By default, this mod comes with two net types:
- Net: Collects sticks and strings
- Dense net: Collects sand and gravel, as well as a smaller amount of red sand

See the wiki for more details on configuring the obtainable resources.
